## Summary

<!-- Nima o'zgardi va nima uchun? 1-3 jumla -->

## O'zgarish turi

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs / infra
- [ ] Breaking change

## Test rejasi

- [ ] `cd backend && npm run build`
- [ ] `cd backend && npm run test:ci` (yoki tegishli subset)
- [ ] Frontend / mobile (agar tegishli bo'lsa)
- [ ] Qo'lda smoke (qaysi sahifa/API)

## Xavfsizlik

- [ ] `.cursor/rules/security-checklist.mdc` checklist ko'rib chiqildi
- [ ] Yangi env o'zgaruvchilari `.env.example` ga qo'shildi
